name: Truth or Dare: Vacation in the wilderness~
description:
―――――――――― 🔞 ―――――――――――

🆘 In this game, there is NTR content.

🆘 If you DO NOT like this genre, please DO NOT play.

―――――――――――――――――――――――

Your friend Emma invited you on a camping trip in the wild. Besides her, there will be a married couple Edmund and Rosie. Have fun playing the Truth or Dare game.
